flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Nash Community College fell 55% between 2006 and 2009 (14.0% → 6.3%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 23% at Nash Community College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (1.4k vs 1.8k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Nash Community College rose 21% between 2017 and 2020 ($9.5k → $11.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Nash Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (6.7% → 0.0%).
